descriptions.overview: Browse all workspace settings in one place.
descriptions.api_docs: Explore REST API endpoints and authentication.
descriptions.custom_domain: Use your own domain for helpefi portal.
descriptions.brands: Manage multiple brands and their appearance.
descriptions.usage_billing: View plan usage, seats, and invoices.
descriptions.change_plan: Upgrade, downgrade, or change your subscription.
descriptions.platform_feedback: Send feedback about the platform to administrators.
descriptions.profile: Profile, password, language, timezone, and two-factor authentication.
descriptions.billing: Usage, subscription plan, and included features.
descriptions.ticket_settings: Ticket numbering, auto-replies, and custom fields.
descriptions.email: Incoming inboxes, outgoing SMTP, and deliverability settings.
descriptions.integrations: Webhooks, Slack, issue trackers, CRM, and Zapier.
descriptions.security: Security policy, SSO, MFA requirements, and data retention.
descriptions.agents: Manage team members, roles, and pending invitations.
descriptions.password: Change the password you use to sign in.
descriptions.two_factor: Secure your account with an authenticator app.
descriptions.macros: Create reusable reply snippets for tickets.
descriptions.notifications: Choose which email and in-app alerts you receive.
descriptions.invitations: Invite new agents and admins to your workspace.
descriptions.teams_departments: Organize agents into teams and departments.
descriptions.skills: Define skills for routing and assignment rules.
descriptions.roles_permissions: Control what each role can view and change.
descriptions.sla_business_hours: Set response targets and working hours.
descriptions.auto_assignment: Route incoming tickets to agents automatically.
descriptions.ticket_numbering: Configure ticket ID format and sequence.
descriptions.email_auto_reply: Send automatic replies when customers email you.
descriptions.customer_fields: Add custom fields to contact profiles.
descriptions.ticket_fields: Add custom fields to ticket records.
descriptions.agent_fields: Add custom fields to agent user profiles.
descriptions.outgoing_email: Configure SMTP for agent email replies.
descriptions.ticket_sources: Web forms, API, and other intake channels.
descriptions.whatsapp_sms: Twilio messaging for WhatsApp and SMS.
descriptions.automation_rules: Trigger actions when ticket conditions match.
descriptions.webhooks: Send ticket events to external systems.
descriptions.slack: Post notifications and replies to Slack channels.
descriptions.shopify: Show order context from Shopify stores.
descriptions.zapier: Connect to thousands of apps via Zapier.
descriptions.security_policy: Password rules, sessions, and access policies.
descriptions.single_sign_on: SAML and OIDC for enterprise login.
descriptions.data_retention: Control how long ticket and audit data is kept.
descriptions.audit_logs: View a history of changes across the workspace.
descriptions.plan_features: See which features your current plan includes.
descriptions.ai_assistant: Configure AI triage, replies, and knowledge search.
descriptions.service_catalog: Request forms and catalog items for customers.
descriptions.service_desk: ITIL workflows for changes, problems, and incidents.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your name, email, profile picture, language, timezone, and appearance.
profile.password_description: Change the password you use to sign in.
profile.security_description: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app.
profile.mfa_required: Two-factor authentication is required for your account. Enable it below to continue using helpefi.
profile.name: Name
profile.timezone_hint: Dates and times are shown in this timezone. Leave blank to use the workspace default ({timezone}).
profile.appearance_hint: Choose light, dark, or match your device settings.
profile.avatar_hint: Choose how your avatar appears across tickets, the sidebar, and team views.
profile.avatar_gravatar_hint: Use the photo linked to your email at gravatar.com.
profile.avatar_upload_hint: Upload a JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image up to 2 MB.
profile.two_factor_disabled: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app.
profile.recovery_codes_title: Save these recovery codes in a safe place:
profile.scan_qr_code: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.).
profile.authenticator_secret: Add this secret to your authenticator app:
